## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue(s) this PR addresses. 

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Research contribution (new methodology, experiment, or analysis)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Research Context

How does this contribution relate to the behavioral primitives framework or institutional dynamics research?

## Methodology

If applicable, describe the methodology used:

- [ ] Theoretical development
- [ ] Empirical analysis
- [ ] Simulation study
- [ ] Dataset curation
- [ ] Tool development

## Testing

- [ ] I have added unit tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have added integration tests if applicable
- [ ] Test coverage is maintained or improved (>80%)

## Documentation

- [ ] I have updated docstrings for all public functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation files
- [ ] I have added examples where appropriate

## Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `pre-commit` hooks successfully
- [ ] Type hints are complete for new functions
- [ ] No new linting errors introduced

## Ethics Compliance

- [ ] This contribution complies with our ethics guidelines (see ETHICS.md)
- [ ] No potential for harmful misuse identified
- [ ] If using data, proper licensing and privacy considerations addressed

## Data & Reproducibility

If this PR includes research results:

- [ ] Random seeds are documented and fixed
- [ ] Data sources are properly cited
- [ ] Analysis can be reproduced from provided code
- [ ] Results are validated against benchmarks if available

## Screenshots/Examples

If applicable, add screenshots or example outputs to demonstrate the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] My code follows the project's code standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Additional Notes

Add any additional information that reviewers should know.

---

**Thank you for contributing to the Institutional Design Lab!** 🎉

Your PR will be reviewed according to our [governance process](GOVERNANCE.md). We aim to provide feedback within one week.
